---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What is the use case? What problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

How would you like to see this work? Be as concrete as possible (function signature, CLI shape, tool description text, expected output).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you chose the proposed one.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, papers, prior art, or upstream discussions.
